do_not_use_when: You only need to know one specific dep (just run the script and read the error)
purpose: Survey the SETEC framework's five dependency tiers (core, acquisition, ocr, calibration, surprisal) plus the optional power-ups tier. Reports what's installed, what's missing, and what the operator needs for the surface they're aiming at.
use_when: An ImportError or "module not found" error fires from any SETEC script
Confirming readiness before running a calibration or replication batch
